title: allium israeliticum
intro: Allium israeliticum, also known as Israeli garlic, is a species of plant in the Allium genus, which is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its sulfur compounds. Consuming Allium israeliticum is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
